TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-pear5__awi_ a basi_

S.FORM: hayzani 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh kamamanra:an 'am rokrok ka boway sa'oewaz o 'am rokrok ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 現在有一個男人摘水果。
Now there was a man picking fruits.

S.FORM: mwa:i' 'aehae' mae'iyaeh ka 'ima hoehoe ka 'a Siri'.
S.TRANSL: 來了一個拉著山羊的人。
(There) came a person pulling a goat.

S.FORM: may isason ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.TRANSL: (他)經過那個樹下面。
(He) passed by there under the tree.

S.FORM: naw koSa'en bo boway bilis sahpih.
S.TRANSL: (那個男人)碰了一下水果然後走了。
(The man) touched the fruits and went away.

S.FORM: mwa:i' 'aehae' ka 'a korkoring hiya' hayza koSa'en ka kapapama'an noka mae'iyaeh a sarak nak hini.
S.TRANSL: 來了一個騎腳踏車的小孩, 就像這樣踩
(There) came a child riding a vehicle which you stomp like this.

S.FORM: sa saksakosiza sararakis.
S.TRANSL: (那個男孩)東張西望往上看(那個男人)。
(The boy) looked around and upward (to the man).

S.FORM: 'aehae' koSa'en ka kamamanra:an m rokrok ka boway 'okay sahae'oe.
S.TRANSL: 摘水果的人沒有往下看。
The man picking fruits did not look downward.

S.FORM: a noka a korkoring sikarma' 'aehae' koSa'en kala' ka 'a boway pama'en ila.
S.TRANSL: 小孩偷了一籃, 載走了。
The child took away one basket and rode off.

S.FORM: sipanra:an 'ita' koSaen ka tinawa'an batbato'an ki hinghae'.
S.TRANSL: (小孩騎著它的腳踏車)經過一條石頭路。
(The child rode his bike) through a stony road.

S.FORM: a mwa:i' naehaen 'aehae' koSa'en ka a kabinao' hinghae' ma papamaan nak hini koSa'en ka a nonak sarakan ka kapapama'an.
S.TRANSL: 又來了一個女孩像這樣踩著腳踏車來。
(There) came a girl also riding a vehicle which you stomp like this.

S.FORM: hiza 'am kaklepiih rima' pon'aisin seiti' ka 'a tatpo' sahae' ila ray ra:i' ray ra:an isaa.
S.TRANSL: (他們兩個)在途中相遇, (其中一個)碰到帽子 (使得帽子)掉在地上。
(Both of them) met along the way; (one of them) touched the hat (causing it) to fall on the ground.

S.FORM: hiza kamamanra:an korkoring hibih sakosizah.
S.TRANSL: 男孩回頭看。
The child turned his head around and saw.

S.FORM: nisia ka kapapama'an rima isaa sipatono' ila ray ta malben ila malben hiza karma' koSa'en ka 'a boway 'aehae' kala' sisaah ila ray 'a tinawa'an.
S.TRANSL: 那籃(被男孩)偷走的水果掉到地上。
The basket of fruit that (the boy) had stolen fell on the ground.

S.FORM: hayza' mwa:i' sepat ka korkoring ta tatilhaehael rokrok hayza' ka boway.
S.TRANSL: 來了四個小孩幫忙撿水果。
Came four children who helped pick the fruits.

S.FORM: taboe'en naehaen ray kala' tatilhaehaelen sitil'itol 'askanen ray kapapama'an nisia.
S.TRANSL: 放到籃子裡, 提起來, 放到腳踏車。
(They) put (the fruits) in the basket, lifted it, and put it on the bike.

S.FORM: ka manra:an ila.
S.TRANSL: (男孩)走了。
(The boy) walked away.

S.FORM: manra:an 'okik koza' 'oSa'an.
S.TRANSL: (當那個男孩)沒有走多遠,
(When the boy) had not gone long/far,

S.FORM: nisia ka tatpo' haysia ray tinawa'an.
S.TRANSL: 他的帽子還在路上。
His hat was still on the ground.

S.FORM: hayza' to:o' sahoeroe' ka tatpo'.
S.TRANSL: 有三個 ... (他們)找到帽子。
There were three... (they) found the hat.

S.FORM: mari'in nisia pal'is'isen pal'is'isen.
S.TRANSL: (有一個男孩)拿起(帽子)拍一拍, 拍乾淨。
(One of the boys) took (the hat and) shook it clean.

S.FORM: ta mintani' ila naehaen.
S.TRANSL: 那男孩停了一會兒。
"The boy stopped for a while.

S.FORM: sabowayen ila nisia ka 'a tatpo' sabowayen ka tatpo'.
S.TRANSL: (一個男孩)走向 (那個小孩) 把帽子還給他。
(One of the boys) walked toward (the boy) and gave the hat (back to him).

S.FORM: isa mobay ila ka boway.
S.TRANSL: (小孩)給(他們)水果。
(The boy) gave (them) fruit.

S.FORM: kayzaeh to:o' koSa'en ka 'a korkoring.
S.TRANSL: 那三個小孩很好。
The three children were good.

S.FORM: 'ima manra:an ila rihani' ma 'a rima' nakhini koSa'en makaksiyae' a si'ael ka boway.
S.TRANSL: (那些小孩)吃著水果高興的走了。
(The children) walked away happily eating the fruit.

S.FORM: manra:an rima' may hiza ray kaehoey pingi'.
S.TRANSL: (他們)經過樹下面。
(They) walked away passing by under the tree.

S.FORM: sope ila.
S.TRANSL: (他)數 (籃子)。
(He) counted (the baskets).

S.FORM: 'ampowa ila ma'an kaysa'an rokrok ka 'a boway.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼了? 我剛剛摘的水果(哪裡去了)?
What's happened? (Where are) the fruits I just picked?

S.FORM: hawka' hini 'aehae' kala' a.
S.TRANSL: (他)不見了一籃。
(He) didn't see the (one) basket.

S.FORM: saksakosiza ila 'oka'i: 'ikoSa karma'en haysani hayno' ila.
S.TRANSL: 他四下張望, 說, 被偷的那一籃現在在哪裡?
He turned around and said, 'where is the stolen (basket) now?'

S.FORM: hiza ray 'inaz'azem 'ima komoSa: hayza to:o' korkoring marma' sasailin rihani' 'ima nak'ino a' 'oka' ila sekela'i.
S.TRANSL: 三個小孩把籃子藏在附近 我不知道在哪裡。
Three children have hidden (the basket) nearby. Where (I) don't know.

S.FORM: isaa' kita' ila nanaw koSa: nisia bibilis boway 'aehae' mae'iyaeh 'aehae'.
S.TRANSL: 他拿水果給他們一人一個。
He took one fruit for each one of them.

S.FORM: isaa ma'an kita' papay isaa papay hini'.
S.TRANSL: 我所看到的故事就到這裡。
(My story about) what I've seen ends here.
